name: Great Dislocator Crystal
description: Brilliant discolorations in the surface of this weapon appear, then fade in a random pattern. An elaborate handle contains a thumb-sized indent coated in gold filigree. This property functions as a dislocator weapon, except the target can be teleported up to 30 feet in any direction (Will DC 20 negates).
unidentifiedDesc: A brilliant discolored weapon augmentation crystal.
